description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine rate_2, and is implemented by a call to rate_2. Use this API to check branch loadings. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = rate(sid, all, linflg, rating, fmax)
python_syntax: ierr = rate(sid, all, linflg, rating, fmax)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: linflg
parameters.description: Branch check to be applied. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: rating
parameters.description: Rating to be used. (input; default rating set program option setting by default).

parameters.name: fmax
parameters.description: Line loading limit, in percent; 0.0 =< fmax =< 500.0. (input; 100.0 by default).

all.description: process only branches connected to buses in subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
